name: Essence of the Body body armour (Normal start)
description: Guarantee a Life mod on a body armour via an essence, then exalt for resistances and defensive scaling.

steps.outcome: Normal → Magic with one random modifier. (Optionally also Augment to add a second magic mod — both will be preserved through the next essence step.)
Magic → Rare. The magic modifier(s) are PRESERVED and the essence adds its guaranteed +maximum Life mod. A 1-mod Magic becomes a 2-mod Rare; a 2-mod Magic becomes a 3-mod Rare.
Each Exalt adds one random mod (up to 6 total). Aim for at least 2 resistance rolls before stopping. Mod tier scales with item level — high ilvl bases roll bigger numbers.

notes_for_user: Solid baseline body armour. The Life mod is your floor. For a tankier build, use a strength-base armour (e.g. Plate Vest) so the Life prefix tiers higher. **Avoid Greater Essence on a low-ilvl chest** — it works mechanically but bumps the required level (e.g. Greater on ilvl 15 → required level 48 to equip). Advanced: 'Omen of Sinistral Exaltation' forces prefix-only Exalts, useful for locking defensive prefixes.
